text.autoconfig.hudmanager.title: HUD Manager Configs
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Action: Locates just above the hotbar, displays various texts.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.AutoSa: Locates in the bottom right of screen, displays autosaving.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.BossBa: Locates at the top of screen, displays health of boss mobs.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Closed: Locates in the bottom right of screen, displays sounds in game.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Crossh: Locates in the middle of screen, displays the aim point.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.DebugS: Displayed when F3 is pressed, displays various information.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Player: Displayed while holding down Tab, displays player information.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Scoreb: Locates on the right of screen, displays objective information.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Screen: Locates in the middle of screen, displays various texts.
text.autoconfig.hudmanager.option.Status: Locates in the top right of screen, displays status effects.
